title: Pack of 24 Tall Drinking Tumblers - Modern Dimple Effect Reusable Plastic Adults Kids, Outdoor Party Summer BBQ Picnic Cups Bulk Restaurants Tableware Wholesale
features: SUMMER: The perfect wine goblets or tumblers for summer! Ideal for BBQs, outdoor parties, weddings and more. Fill them with a drink of your choice from beer, water, wine or juice and just enjoy the sun.

DESIGN: Featuring a modern dimple effect finish, these goblets and tumblers will add that much needed contemporary feel to your summer dinner scape. A stylish addition to your BBQ, party or any outdoor venue.

DURABLE: Unlike glass products, these durable goblets and tumblers are resilient and can take a fall. Made from a strong polystyrene material these goblets and tumblers are perfect for taking on picnics or camping trips as you don't have to worry about them being smashed in transit.
WHAT'S INCLUDED: This set includes 24 dimple effect goblets or 24 tumblers. Perfect for large venues or parties. Not dishwasher or microwave safe.
SIZE: One goblet measures approximately 20 x 8cm with a capacity of 400ml. One tumbler measures 15 x 9cm with a capacity of 650ml. Easy to store for you to use year after year.
description: Product Description SUMMER : The perfect wine goblets, champagne flutes and tumblers for summer! Ideal for BBQs, outdoor parties, weddings and more. Fill them with a drink of your choice from beer, water, wine or juice and just enjoy the sun. Made from a strong polystyrene material these goblets, flutes and tumblers are perfect for taking on picnics or camping trips as you don't have to worry about them being smashed in transit. Champagne Flute SIZE : One tumbler measures approximately 22.5 x 6cm with a capacity of 250ml.
